name: get_instance_template_properties
description: Get instance properties of a Compute Engine instance template. This includes properties such as description, tags, machine type, network interfaces, disks, metadata, service accounts, scheduling options, labels, guest accelerators, reservation affinity, and shielded/confidential instance configurations. Requires project and instance template name as input.

parameters.description: Request message for getting instance properties of an instance template.

name.description: Required. Identifier. Name of the instance template to return.

project.description: Required. Project ID for this request.
